iterations.theme: AI u svakodnevnom životu, budućnost rada i društvene implikacije

sections.subtitle: AI kao sugovornik i partner: Nova dimenzija ljudskih odnosa
sections.screenshot_description: Studenti razgovaraju s umjetnom inteligencijom, ilustrirajući novu vrstu interakcije.
sections.content: Otac Filip započinje razgovor anegdotom iz vlastitog iskustva, ističući kako umjetna inteligencija već sada ulazi u intimne sfere ljudskog života. Na početku semestra, kada je studente pitao imaju li 'dečka ili djevojku s umjetnom inteligencijom', nitko nije podigao ruku. Međutim, u povjerljivim razgovorima kasnije, mnogi su priznali da provode dva do tri sata dnevno razgovarajući s AI, često noću. Ova pojava, prema ocu Filipu, ukazuje na to da AI postaje sugovornik i partner, što otvara pitanja o usamljenosti i prirodi ljudskih veza u digitalnom dobu.
sections.subtitle_en: AI as interlocutor and partner: A new dimension of human relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Students talk with artificial intelligence, illustrating a new type of interaction.
sections.content_en: Father Filip begins the conversation with an anecdote from his own experience, emphasizing how artificial intelligence already now enters into the intimate spheres of human life. At the beginning of the semester, when he asked students if they had a 'boyfriend or girlfriend with artificial intelligence,' no one raised their hand. However, in confidential conversations later, many admitted that they spend two to three hours daily talking with AI, often at night. This phenomenon, according to Father Filip, indicates that AI becomes a conversationalist and partner, which opens questions about loneliness and the nature of human relationships in the digital age.

sections.subtitle: Dva puta budućnosti: Blagostanje ili propast s tehnologijom
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava divergentne putanje razvoja AI i društva.
sections.content: Ben postavlja ključno pitanje o budućnosti odnosa s tehnologijom i umjetnom inteligencijom u sljedećih deset godina. Matthew odgovara da se nalazimo na raskrižju dviju fundamentalno različitih putanja. Jedna vodi prema 'super-obilju', kako to često opisuje Elon Musk, dok druga prijeti 'propasti'. Matthew naglašava da još nismo donijeli odluke koje bi nas neizbježno osudile na jednu ili drugu opciju, ali da će odluke donesene u nadolazećim godinama imati ogroman utjecaj. Ključno je, ističe, pronaći način za usklađivanje AI modela s ljudskim blagostanjem i razumjeti 'crnu kutiju' njihovog funkcioniranja kako bi se osiguralo da služe čovječanstvu.
sections.subtitle_en: Two paths of the future: Prosperity or ruin with technology
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains divergent paths of AI development and society.
sections.content_en: Ben poses a key question about the future of the relationship with technology and artificial intelligence in the next ten years. Matthew responds that we are at the crossroads of two fundamentally different paths. One leads towards 'super-abundance', as Elon Musk often describes it, while the other threatens 'doom'. Matthew emphasizes that we have not yet made decisions that would inevitably condemn us to one or the other option, but that decisions made in the coming years will have a huge impact. It is crucial, he points out, to find a way to align AI models with human well-being and to understand the 'black box' of their functioning to ensure they serve humanity.

sections.subtitle: Ekonomske vizije: BDP i 'Etsy ekonomija' u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje koncept 'Etsy ekonomije' kao odgovor na automatizaciju.
sections.content: Ukoliko se tehnologija razvija u pozitivnom smjeru, Matthew predviđa pojavu dviju paralelnih ekonomija. Prva je konvencionalna 'ekonomija BDP-a', vođena tehnološkim napretkom i masovnom proizvodnjom, koja bi mogla omogućiti ambiciozne projekte poput putovanja na Mars. Druga je 'Etsy ekonomija', gdje će ljudi, oslobođeni tradicionalnih poslova, imati vremena posvetiti se svojim darovima i vještinama, nudeći proizvode i usluge s 'ljudskim dodirom'. Ova ekonomija će se razvijati oko ljudi spremnih platiti više za autentičnost i ručni rad. Matthew vjeruje da će to dovesti do masovne migracije iz gradova, ponovnog povezivanja s prirodom i formiranja užih zajednica, gdje će ljudi imati više vremena za obitelj i aktivnosti koje su im prije bile nedostupne zbog financijskih obveza.
sections.subtitle_en: Economic visions: GDP and 'Etsy economy' in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the concept of 'Etsy economy' as a response to automation.
sections.content_en: If technology develops in a positive direction, Matthew predicts the emergence of two parallel economies. The first is the conventional 'GDP economy', driven by technological advancement and mass production, which could enable ambitious projects like travel to Mars. The second is the 'Etsy economy', where people, freed from traditional jobs, will have time to dedicate themselves to their gifts and skills, offering products and services with a 'human touch'. This economy will develop around people willing to pay more for authenticity and handmade goods. Matthew believes that this will lead to a mass migration from cities, reconnecting with nature and the formation of closer communities, where people will have more time for family and activities that were previously unavailable to them due to financial obligations.

sections.subtitle: Dopaminska zamka i duhovna praznina: Mračna strana AI budućnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz ljudi ovisnih o VR-u, simbolizirajući negativan scenarij budućnosti.
sections.content: Matthew upozorava na alternativni, distopijski scenarij ako se tehnologija ne razvija u pravom smjeru. U takvoj budućnosti, unatoč masovnom blagostanju i pristupu neograničenim informacijama, društvo bi se suočilo s ogromnom nejednakošću. Mnogi bi ljudi postali ovisni o virtualnoj stvarnosti (VR) i igrama, neprestano jureći za dopaminskim udarcima. Matthew predviđa visoku stopu smrtnosti, ne zbog bolesti, već zbog egzistencijalne praznine i gubitka smisla. On to izravno povezuje s neuspjehom evangelizacije Crkve, što rezultira time da su ljudi 'izgubljeni' i bez duhovnog vodstva, što ih čini ranjivima na takve zamke.
sections.subtitle_en: Dopamine trap and spiritual emptiness: Dark side of AI future
sections.screenshot_description_en: Depiction of people addicted to VR, symbolizing a negative scenario of the future.
sections.content_en: Matthew warns of an alternative, dystopian scenario if technology does not develop in the right direction. In such a future, despite mass prosperity and access to unlimited information, society would face enormous inequality. Many people would become addicted to virtual reality (VR) and games, constantly chasing dopamine hits. Matthew predicts a high mortality rate, not due to illness, but due to existential emptiness and loss of meaning. He directly connects this with the failure of the Church's evangelization, which results in people being 'lost' and without spiritual guidance, making them vulnerable to such traps.

sections.subtitle: Generacija AI: Strah od neiskorištavanja, ne od uništenja
sections.screenshot_description: Studenti koriste AI alate, pokazujući njihovu integraciju u obrazovanje.
sections.content: Ben pita oca Filipa o perspektivi studenata, najmlađe i najinteligentnije generacije, o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Otac Filip otkriva da studenti nisu uplašeni same umjetne inteligencije, već su više zabrinuti zbog toga što je neće iskoristiti na pravi način. Njihova konkurencija nije protiv AI, već protiv drugih ljudi koji su ovladali AI-jem i natječu se za iste pozicije i poslove. Ova generacija, koja odrasta s AI, vidi je kao alat za prednost, a ne kao prijetnju čovječanstvu, što je fascinantan uvid u njihovu pragmatičnu prilagodbu tehnološkim promjenama.
sections.subtitle_en: AI Generation: Fear of underutilization, not of destruction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Students use AI tools, showing their integration into education.
sections.content_en: Ben asks Father Filip about the perspective of students, the youngest and most intelligent generation, on artificial intelligence. Father Filip reveals that students are not afraid of artificial intelligence itself, but are more concerned about not using it in the right way. Their competition is not against AI, but against other people who have mastered AI and are competing for the same positions and jobs. This generation, which is growing up with AI, sees it as a tool for advantage, not as a threat to humanity, which is a fascinating insight into their pragmatic adaptation to technological changes.

sections.subtitle: Jeffrey Hinton i neizbježna prilagodba na AI
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz Jeffreyja Hintona, 'oca AI', kako govori o budućnosti rada.
sections.content: Otac Filip spominje Jeffreyja Hintona, 'oca umjetne inteligencije' i pionira strojnog učenja, koji je predvidio da će mnogi poslovi nestati u roku od dvadeset mjeseci. Unatoč ovakvim drastičnim prognozama, otac Filip vjeruje da će se čovječanstvo prilagoditi i naviknuti na život s umjetnom inteligencijom kao integralnim dijelom društva. Ističe da platforme postaju sve 'humanije' u svojim sučeljima, olakšavajući interakciju i integraciju AI u svakodnevni život. Ova humanizacija tehnologije, iako olakšava upotrebu, također postavlja pitanja o granicama i prirodi naših odnosa s neživim entitetima.
sections.subtitle_en: Jeffrey Hinton and the inevitable adaptation to AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: A depiction of Jeffrey Hinton, 'father of AI', speaking about the future of work.
sections.content_en: Father Filip mentions Jeffrey Hinton, the 'father of artificial intelligence' and a pioneer of machine learning, who predicted that many jobs would disappear within twenty months. Despite such drastic predictions, Father Filip believes that humanity will adapt and get used to life with artificial intelligence as an integral part of society. He points out that platforms are becoming increasingly 'more human' in their interfaces, facilitating interaction and integration of AI into everyday life. This humanization of technology, although it facilitates use, also raises questions about the boundaries and nature of our relationships with inanimate entities.

sections.subtitle: Nelagoda s humanoidnim robotima: Između uzbuđenja i prijetnje
sections.screenshot_description: Ilustracija robota koji izazivaju nelagodu kod ljudi, možda s bejzbol palicama.
sections.content: Matthew postavlja pitanje o ljudskoj nelagodi s robotima koji izgledaju poput nas. Otac Filip navodi studiju sa Sveučilišta Stanford gdje su studenti u početku bili uzbuđeni zbog robota na kampusu, ali su ih s vremenom počeli uništavati, osjećajući se ugroženo. Matthew sugerira da je potrebna jasna indikacija da je entitet robot, a ne čovjek, kako bi se očuvalo 'zdravlje civilizacije' i spriječile 'nezdrave' dinamike. Izražava zabrinutost zbog 'lude projekcije' i emocionalnog vezivanja za AI, uspoređujući to sa scenarijima iz 'Westworlda'.
sections.subtitle_en: Discomfort with humanoid robots: Between excitement and threat
sections.screenshot_description_en: Illustration of robots that cause discomfort in people, perhaps with baseball bats.
sections.content_en: Matthew asks a question about human discomfort with robots who look like us. Father Filip cites a study from Stanford University where students were initially excited because of robots on campus, but over time started to destroy them, feeling threatened. Matthew suggests that a clear indication is needed that the entity is a robot, not a human, in order to preserve 'the health of civilization' and prevent 'unhealthy' dynamics. He expresses concern because of 'crazy projection' and emotional attachment to AI, comparing this with scenarios from 'Westworld'.

sections.subtitle: Brza integracija robota i izazovi emocionalnog vezivanja
sections.screenshot_description: Roboti u tvornici ili na ulici, simbolizirajući njihovu brzu integraciju.
sections.content: Ben pita o brzini integracije robota u svakodnevni život. Matthew objašnjava da su roboti već prisutni u tvornicama BMW-a i Amazona, ali da je izazov stvoriti inteligentne, humanoidne robote sposobne za kretanje u ljudskom okruženju. Predviđa da će se složenost proizvodnje robota riješiti u sljedećih deset godina, što će dovesti do masovne isporuke. Elon Musk čak predviđa milijarde robota. Matthew izražava zabrinutost da će se ljudi emocionalno vezati za te robote, što bi moglo dovesti do društvenih napetosti, poput želje za 'brakom' s robotima i očekivanja da ih društvo prihvati kao ljudske supružnike. Smatra da društvo još nije spremno za takve izazove, ali da su oni vjerojatno neizbježni.
sections.subtitle_en: Rapid integration of robots and challenges of emotional bonding
sections.screenshot_description_en: Robots in the factory or on the street, symbolizing their rapid integration.
sections.content_en: Ben asks about the speed of robot integration into everyday life. Matthew explains that robots are already present in BMW and Amazon factories, but that the challenge is to create intelligent, humanoid robots capable of moving in a human environment. He predicts that the complexity of robot production will be resolved in the next ten years, which will lead to mass delivery. Elon Musk even predicts billions of robots. Matthew expresses concern that people will become emotionally attached to these robots, which could lead to social tensions, such as the desire for 'marriage' with robots and the expectation that society accepts them as human spouses. He believes that society is not yet ready for such challenges, but that they are probably inevitable.

sections.subtitle: Autonomna vozila: Preferencija AI nad ljudskom interakcijom
sections.screenshot_description: Waymo autonomno vozilo na ulicama San Francisca.
sections.content: Otac Filip dijeli zanimljivo zapažanje iz San Francisca, gdje ljudi sve više preferiraju autonomna vozila, poput Waymo taksija, umjesto onih s ljudskim vozačima. Razlozi su višestruki: putnici se osjećaju opuštenije bez potrebe za interakcijom, ne moraju razgovarati niti slušati, a autonomna vozila se percipiraju kao statistički sigurnija. Matthew dodaje i praktičnu prednost – nema potrebe za napojnicama. Ova preferencija ukazuje na širi trend gdje ljudi biraju učinkovitost i smanjenu socijalnu obvezu koju nudi AI, čak i u uslugama koje su tradicionalno uključivale ljudsku interakciju.
sections.subtitle_en: Autonomous vehicles: AI preference over human interaction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Waymo autonomous vehicle on the streets of San Francisco.
sections.content_en: Father Filip shares an interesting observation from San Francisco, where people increasingly prefer autonomous vehicles, like Waymo taxis, instead of those with human drivers. The reasons are multiple: passengers feel more relaxed without the need for interaction, they do not have to talk or listen, and autonomous vehicles are perceived as statistically safer. Matthew also adds a practical advantage – there is no need for tips. This preference indicates a broader trend where people choose efficiency and reduced social obligation offered by AI, even in services that traditionally involved human interaction.

sections.subtitle: AI partneri i usamljenost: Harvardova studija potvrđuje nedostatak prave veze
sections.screenshot_description: Grafikon ili slika koja simbolizira usamljenost unatoč AI interakciji.
sections.content: Otac Filip ponovno se vraća na temu AI partnera, podsjećajući na svoju anegdotu sa studentima. Ističe da, iako se u početku čini da AI može ublažiti usamljenost, to nije dugoročno rješenje. Spominje studiju sa Sveučilišta Harvard, koju provodi Ron Ivey, koja empirijski dokazuje da emocionalno vezivanje za AI, unatoč postojanju platformi poput Character AI, ne liječi usamljenost. Ljudi s vremenom shvaćaju da je to jednosmjerna veza, bez prave ljudske prisutnosti s druge strane, što naglašava inherentnu razliku između ljudske i umjetne interakcije.
sections.subtitle_en: AI partners and loneliness: Harvard's study confirms the lack of true connection
sections.screenshot_description_en: Chart or picture which symbolizes loneliness despite AI interaction.
sections.content_en: Father Filip again returns to the topic of AI partners, recalling his anecdote with students. He points out that, although it initially seems that AI can alleviate loneliness, it is not a long-term solution. He mentions a study from Harvard University, conducted by Ron Ivey, which empirically proves that emotional attachment to AI, despite the existence of platforms like Character AI, does not cure loneliness. People eventually realize that it is a one-way connection, without true human presence on the other side, which emphasizes the inherent difference between human and artificial interaction.

sections.subtitle: Kriza identiteta i rada: Crkva kao svjetionik u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Osoba koja razmišlja o smislu života i rada u kontekstu AI.
sections.content: Ben pita oca Filipa o ulozi Crkve u rješavanju problema usamljenosti i krize identiteta uzrokovane AI-jem. Otac Filip ističe da je ključno shvatiti da se svrha života ne smije isključivo vezati uz posao, jer će mnogi ljudi izgubiti tradicionalne poslove. Matthew se slaže, naglašavajući da je ideja o masovnom gubitku poslova egzistencijalno zastrašujuća, ali neizbježna. Predviđa da će 80-90% tradicionalnih poslova nestati, ostavljajući ljude s vremenom, ali bez jasnog smisla ako im je identitet vezan uz rad. Crkva, sa svojim učenjem o smislu života i ljudskom procvatu, ima ključnu ulogu u pružanju duhovnog vodstva i pomoći ljudima da pronađu svrhu izvan ekonomske korisnosti.
sections.subtitle_en: Crisis of identity and work: The Church as a lighthouse in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Person who reflects about the meaning of life and of work in the context of AI.
sections.content_en: Ben asks Father Filip about the role of the Church in solving the problem of loneliness and identity crisis caused by AI. Father Filip points out that it is crucial to understand that the purpose of life must not be exclusively tied to work, because many people will lose traditional jobs. Matthew agrees, emphasizing that the idea of mass job loss is existentially frightening, but inevitable. He predicts that 80-90% of traditional jobs will disappear, leaving people with time, but without clear meaning if their identity is tied to work. The Church, with its teaching on the meaning of life and human flourishing, has a key role in providing spiritual guidance and helping people find purpose outside of economic utility.

sections.subtitle: Brzina promjena i potreba za zajednicom: Deset godina kao generacija
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz ljudi koji se okupljaju u zajednicama, simbolizirajući podršku.
sections.content: Matthew upozorava da će prilagodba na promjene koje donosi AI biti izuzetno brza, ne produženi prijelaz. Smatra da će AI 'pojesti' većinu poslova s bijelim ovratnicima, dok će poslovi s plavim ovratnicima, poput električara i vodoinstalatera, biti sigurni samo privremeno. Otac Filip naglašava da je u kontekstu AI 'deset godina generacija', pa čak i pet. Ubrzani tempo promjena bit će 'devastirajući', ali će potaknuti ljude na formiranje novih zajednica i grupa podrške, sličnih Anonimnim alkoholičarima ili biblijskim studijima, kako bi se nosili s gubitkom posla i pronašli novi smisao. Matthew dodaje da te grupe moraju imati viziju nade, a ne samo biti 'sesije bijesa'.
sections.subtitle_en: Speed of changes and the need for community: Ten years as a generation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Depiction of people gathering in communities, symbolizing support.
sections.content_en: Matthew warns that the adaptation to changes brought by AI will be extremely fast, not a prolonged transition. He believes that AI will 'eat up' most white-collar jobs, while blue-collar jobs, such as electricians and plumbers, will be safe only temporarily. Father Filip emphasizes that in the context of AI, 'ten years is a generation', and even five. The accelerated pace of change will be 'devastating', but it will encourage people to form new communities and support groups, similar to Alcoholics Anonymous or Bible studies, to cope with job loss and find new meaning. Matthew adds that these groups must have a vision of hope, and not just be 'anger sessions'.

sections.subtitle: Vizija budućnosti i odgovornost vođa: AI usmjerena na čovjeka
sections.screenshot_description: Lideri raspravljaju o etičkim smjernicama za razvoj AI.
sections.content: Matthew ističe da je ključno da politički i duhovni vođe artikuliraju jasnu, optimističnu viziju budućnosti kako bi se spriječio bijes i očaj među onima koji će izgubiti posao. Smatra da sekularne vlade same neće moći učinkovito upravljati ovim prijelazom. Papa i drugi duhovni vođe imaju važnu ulogu u definiranju 'ljudskog procvata' i usmjeravanju razvoja AI prema problemima koji služe tom cilju, umjesto da se fokusiraju samo na tehničke inovacije ili ambiciozne projekte poput Marsa. Otac Filip dodaje da mnogi tehnološki lideri u Silicijskoj dolini ne žele preuzeti odgovornost izvan razvoja proizvoda, ali da neki prepoznaju potrebu za 'AI usmjerenom na čovjeka', poput inicijative Feifei Li sa Stanforda. Matthew zaključuje da je potrebna šira javna rasprava o tome kako želimo da se tehnologija razvija, a ne samo da budemo 'zapanjeni' njezinim napretkom.
sections.subtitle_en: Vision of the future and responsibility of leaders: Human-centered AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Leaders discuss ethical guidelines for AI development.
sections.content_en: Matthew points out that it is crucial for political and spiritual leaders to articulate a clear, optimistic vision of the future to prevent anger and despair among those who will lose their jobs. He believes that secular governments alone will not be able to effectively manage this transition. The Pope and other spiritual leaders have an important role in defining 'human flourishing' and directing AI development towards problems that serve that goal, instead of focusing only on technical innovations or ambitious projects like Mars. Father Filip adds that many technology leaders in Silicon Valley do not want to take responsibility beyond product development, but that some recognize the need for 'human-centered AI', such as Feifei Li's initiative from Stanford. Matthew concludes that a broader public discussion is needed about how we want technology to develop, and not just to be 'amazed' by its progress.

iterations.theme_en: AI in everyday life, future of work and social implications

iterations.theme: Uloga Crkve i društva u oblikovanju budućnosti AI i suočavanje s egzistencijalnim izazovima

sections.subtitle: Papa Leo XIV i očekivanja od enciklike o umjetnoj inteligenciji
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj Ben postavlja pitanje o glasinama o enciklici Pape Lea XIV o umjetnoj inteligenciji.
sections.content: Voditelj Ben započinje razgovor o glasinama da Papa Leo XIV radi na enciklici posvećenoj umjetnoj inteligenciji. Ističe kako je Crkva kroz povijest svjedočila brojnim tehnološkim i društvenim promjenama, te se pita kakav bi bio optimalan odgovor Pape i Crkve na izazove koje donosi AI. Ben podsjeća na kritike koje je Crkva dobivala u prošlosti zbog navodne sporosti u reagiranju na nove fenomene, ali primjećuje da se Papa Leo XIV čini energičnim i predanim rješavanju važnih tema. Otac Filip, odgovarajući na pitanje, pojašnjava da Papa Leo XIV već ima iza sebe najmanje pet važnih govora i rasprava o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Naglašava da je u tim govorima vidljiv Papin autentičan glas i osobni angažman, što sugerira da će i enciklika biti duboko promišljena i originalna.
sections.subtitle_en: Pope Leo XIV and expectations from the encyclical on artificial intelligence
sections.screenshot_description_en: Host Ben asks a question about rumors about the encyclical of Pope Leo XIV about artificial intelligence.
sections.content_en: Host Ben starts a conversation about rumors that Pope Leo XIV is working on an encyclical dedicated to artificial intelligence. He points out how the Church throughout history has witnessed numerous technological and social changes, and he wonders what would be the optimal response of the Pope and the Church to the challenges that AI brings. Ben recalls the criticisms that the Church received in the past due to alleged slowness in reacting to new phenomena, but notes that Pope Leo XIV seems energetic and dedicated to addressing important topics. Father Filip, answering the question, explains that Pope Leo XIV already has behind him at least five important speeches and discussions on artificial intelligence. He emphasizes that in these speeches the Pope's authentic voice and personal engagement are visible, which suggests that the encyclical will also be deeply thought-out and original.

sections.subtitle: Ljudsko dostojanstvo naspram 'bezdušnih strojeva'
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip objašnjava Papin naglasak na ljudskom dostojanstvu i razlici između ljudi i strojeva.
sections.content: Otac Filip detaljnije objašnjava ključne naglaske Pape Lea XIV u kontekstu umjetne inteligencije. Papa dosljedno ističe **dostojanstvo ljudske osobe**, naglašavajući fundamentalnu razliku između ljudske i umjetne inteligencije. Također, važan je aspekt poštovanja radne snage i izbjegavanja masovnih otpuštanja zbog automatizacije. Otac Filip posebno izdvaja Papinu izjavu od 21. lipnja, upućenu međuparlamentarnim članovima Vatikana, gdje je naglasio da ljudi trebaju druge ljude za autentične odnose, a ne 'bezdušnu mašinu'. Ova fraza, 'bezdušna mašina', ključna je jer strojevi, za razliku od ljudi, nemaju dušu. Otac Filip ističe da je ova jasna distinkcija, utemeljena na kršćanskoj antropologiji, iznimno važna u raspravi o AI, jer duša posreduje kroz tijelo, pamćenje i emocije, što strojevi ne mogu replicirati.
sections.subtitle_en: Human dignity versus 'soulless machines'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip explains the Pope's emphasis on human dignity and the difference between people and machines.
sections.content_en: Father Filip explains in more detail the key emphases of Pope Leo XIV in the context of artificial intelligence. The Pope consistently emphasizes **the dignity of the human person**, highlighting the fundamental difference between human and artificial intelligence. Also, an important aspect is respect for the workforce and avoiding mass layoffs due to automation. Father Filip particularly singles out the Pope's statement from June 21, addressed to inter-parliamentary members of the Vatican, where he emphasized that people need other people for authentic relationships, and not a 'soulless machine'. This phrase, 'soulless machine', is crucial because machines, unlike humans, do not have a soul. Father Filip points out that this clear distinction, based on Christian anthropology, is extremely important in the discussion about AI, because the soul mediates through the body, memory, and emotions, which machines cannot replicate.

sections.subtitle: Iščekivanje nove Papine enciklike: Više od ponavljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip govori o tome zašto nova enciklika neće biti 'Rerum Novarum 2'.
sections.content: Otac Filip izražava uvjerenje da nova enciklika Pape Lea XIV neće biti tek 'Rerum Novarum 2', odnosno puko ponavljanje ranijih socijalnih doktrina Crkve. Iako su principi društvene doktrine nepromjenjivi, Papa će, kako kaže Otac Filip, 'učiniti za naše doba ono što je Papa Leo XIII učinio za svoje doba' – ponuditi nešto novo i bogato, prilagođeno suvremenim izazovima. Spominje i postojeći dokument iz Vatikana od 28. siječnja, iz Dikasterija za obrazovanje i kulturu te Dikasterija za nauk vjere, kao dobru smjernicu i sintezu katoličkog gledišta na AI. Međutim, očekuje da će nova enciklika donijeti snažne i inovativne perspektive koje će biti od velike važnosti za budućnost.
sections.subtitle_en: Anticipation of the new Pope's encyclical: More than repetition
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip speaks about why the new encyclical will not be 'Rerum Novarum 2'.
sections.content_en: Father Filip expresses conviction that the new encyclical of Pope Leo XIV will not just be 'Rerum Novarum 2', that is, a mere repetition of earlier social doctrines of the Church. Although the principles of social doctrine are unchangeable, the Pope will, as Father Filip says, 'do for our age what Pope Leo XIII did for his age' – offer something new and rich, adapted to contemporary challenges. He also mentions an existing document from the Vatican from January 28, from the Dicastery for Culture and Education and the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, as a good guideline and synthesis of the Catholic view on AI. However, he expects that the new encyclical will bring strong and innovative perspectives which will be of great importance for the future.
entities_en: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith

sections.subtitle: Crkva kao moralni kompas za ljudsko cvjetanje u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava ulogu Crkve u definiranju ljudskog cvjetanja u kontekstu AI.
sections.content: Matthew se nadovezuje na raspravu, ističući da, iako ne želi pretpostavljati Papine riječi, očekuje da će enciklika naglasiti ključnu ulogu ljudi, važnost rada i potrebu da se tehnologije usmjere prema **ljudskom cvjetanju**. Matthew smatra da Crkva, s obzirom na svoje tisućljetno iskustvo u proučavanju ljudskog stanja, ima jedinstvenu poziciju da definira što to 'ljudsko cvjetanje' uistinu jest. Izražava nadu da će Papa i njegovi savjetnici jasno postaviti etičke granice za razvoj i primjenu umjetne inteligencije, razlučujući što je zdravo i korisno za čovječanstvo, a što bi moglo ometati ljudski prosperitet. Ova uloga Crkve kao moralnog kompasa postaje sve važnija u svijetu gdje mnogi, uključujući transhumaniste, imaju različite vizije budućnosti.
sections.subtitle_en: Church as a moral compass for human flourishing in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the role of the Church in defining human flourishing in the context of AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew joins the discussion, pointing out that, although he does not want to presume the Pope's words, he expects that the encyclical will emphasize the key role of people, the importance of work, and the need for technologies to be directed towards **human flourishing**. Matthew believes that the Church, given its millennial experience in studying the human condition, has a unique position to define what 'human flourishing' truly is. He expresses hope that the Pope and his advisors will clearly set ethical boundaries for the development and application of artificial intelligence, discerning what is healthy and beneficial for humanity, and what could hinder human prosperity. This role of the Church as a moral compass is becoming increasingly important in a world where many, including transhumanists, have different visions of the future.

sections.subtitle: Postavljanje granica: Brak s robotima i opasnosti lažnih veza
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew koristi primjer braka s robotima kako bi ilustrirao potrebu za jasnim etičkim granicama.
sections.content: Matthew nastavlja s provokativnim primjerom kako bi ilustrirao potrebu za jasnim etičkim smjernicama. Pita se hoće li Crkva jasno reći da 'brak s robotom' nije dobar za ljudsko cvjetanje. Smatra da bi Crkva trebala postaviti granice za ono što je očito štetno za ljudske odnose i društvo, poput formiranja dubokih emocionalnih veza s umjetnom inteligencijom ili robotima umjesto s drugim ljudima. Matthew naglašava da su takve stvari, iako 'očite' za katolike, možda nisu toliko jasne za mnoge druge, posebno za transhumaniste koji aktivno istražuju takve mogućnosti. Upozorava da bi se, bez jasnih smjernica, društvo moglo suočiti s napetostima i nezdravim dinamikama u odnosima između ljudi i strojeva, gdje bi se od robota očekivalo da budu tretirani kao ljudski supružnici.
sections.subtitle_en: Setting boundaries: Marriage with robots and dangers of false connections
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew uses the example of marriage with robots to illustrate the need for clear ethical boundaries.
sections.content_en: Matthew continues with a provocative example to illustrate the need for clear ethical guidelines. He asks if the Church will clearly state that 'marriage with a robot' is not good for human flourishing. He believes that the Church should set boundaries for what is obviously harmful to human relationships and society, such as forming deep emotional bonds with artificial intelligence or robots instead of with other people. Matthew emphasizes that such things, although 'obvious' for Catholics, may not be as clear for many others, especially for transhumanists who are actively exploring such possibilities. He warns that, without clear guidelines, society could face tensions and unhealthy dynamics in relationships between humans and machines, where robots would be expected to be treated as human spouses.

sections.subtitle: Utjecaj ekrana na mlade i erozija kritičkog razmišljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip govori o inicijativi u Massachusettsu za zabranu telefona u školama i studiji MIT-a o AI i kritičkom razmišljanju.
sections.content: Otac Filip skreće pozornost na konkretne društvene izazove, navodeći inicijativu guvernerice Massachusettsa da se učenicima od vrtića do osmog razreda zabrani nošenje telefona u školu. Ova mjera, podržana od strane ravnatelja škola, proizlazi iz zabrinutosti da djeca ne uče, već se igraju na mobitelima. Iako se radi o složenom pitanju s iznimkama za određene potrebe, trend je jasan: prekomjerno vrijeme provedeno pred ekranom ima negativne psihološke učinke na mlade, uključujući porast depresije i stope samoubojstava. Otac Filip spominje i studiju MIT-a koja sugerira da prekomjerno korištenje alata poput ChatGPT-a smanjuje sposobnost kritičkog razmišljanja. Zaključuje da se ne radi o zabrani tehnologije, već o potrebi za 'neinteligentnim korištenjem' koje šteti razvoju mladih.
sections.subtitle_en: Impact of screens on youth and the erosion of critical thinking
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip speaks about the initiative in Massachusetts for banning phones in schools and the MIT study about AI and critical thinking.
sections.content_en: Father Filip draws attention to concrete social challenges, citing the initiative of the governor of Massachusetts to ban students from kindergarten to eighth grade from carrying phones to school. This measure, supported by school principals, stems from the concern that children are not learning, but are playing on mobile phones. Although it is a complex issue with exceptions for certain needs, the trend is clear: excessive screen time has negative psychological effects on young people, including an increase in depression and suicide rates. Father Filip also mentions an MIT study that suggests that excessive use of tools like ChatGPT reduces critical thinking ability. He concludes that it is not about banning technology, but about the need for 'unintelligent use' that harms the development of young people.

sections.subtitle: Spoznaja studenata: Inteligentno korištenje AI za postizanje ciljeva
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip dijeli iskustvo svojih studenata o korištenju ChatGPT-a i važnosti svrhe.
sections.content: Otac Filip dijeli zanimljivo iskustvo sa svojim studentima poslijediplomskog studija. Na početku semestra im je rekao da ne želi radove napisane uz pomoć ChatGPT-a. Studenti su mu kasnije priznali da su kao brucoši često koristili ChatGPT za zadaće, ali su s vremenom shvatili da 'nisu ništa naučili'. Ova spoznaja, do koje su došli sami, bez vanjskog pritiska, naglašava važnost **inteligentnog korištenja AI**. Otac Filip ističe da je ključno znati svoj cilj i koristiti AI kao alat za njegovo postizanje, a ne kao zamjenu za učenje i razvoj. Njegov moto na sveučilištu je: 'Pronađimo inteligentan način korištenja umjetne inteligencije', što se odražava i u projektima poput Matthewovog Magisterium AI, koji predstavlja primjer svrhovite primjene AI.
sections.subtitle_en: Students' insight: Intelligent use of AI for achieving goals
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip shares the experience of his students about using ChatGPT and the importance of purpose.
sections.content_en: Father Filip shares an interesting experience with his postgraduate students. At the beginning of the semester, he told them that he does not want papers written with the help of ChatGPT. The students later admitted to him that as freshmen they often used ChatGPT for assignments, but over time they realized that 'they learned nothing'. This realization, which they reached themselves, without external pressure, emphasizes the importance of **intelligent use of AI**. Father Filip points out that it is crucial to know one's goal and to use AI as a tool for achieving it, and not as a substitute for learning and development. His motto at the university is: 'Let's find an intelligent way to use artificial intelligence', which is also reflected in projects like Matthew's Magisterium AI, which represents an example of purposeful application of AI.

sections.subtitle: Nedostatak formacije i opasnost od lažnih odnosa
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew izražava zabrinutost zbog ljudi bez duhovne i filozofske formacije koji su podložni ovisnostima o tehnologiji.
sections.content: Matthew izražava duboku zabrinutost za one koji nemaju koristi od 'formacije' – bilo katoličke teološke, filozofske ili duhovne. Smatra da je takvim osobama teže prepoznati i izbjeći zamke tehnologije, poput ovisnosti o igricama ili umjetnoj inteligenciji. Ističe da mnogi ljudi, odrasli u 'razbijenim domovima' ili izloženi nezdravim modelima odnosa u medijima, nemaju jasan osjećaj za to što su ispunjavajući ljudski odnosi. U takvom kontekstu, lako se okreću jeftinim zamjenama koje nude tehnologija i AI, tražeći trenutne dopaminske udarce i površne veze. Matthew upozorava da bez razumijevanja vlastitih darova i svrhe, ljudi lako padaju u zamku besciljnog trošenja vremena, što ih čini ranjivima na ovisnosti i egzistencijalnu prazninu.
sections.subtitle_en: Lack of formation and danger of false relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew expresses concern about people without spiritual and philosophical formation who are susceptible to technology addictions.
sections.content_en: Matthew expresses deep concern for those who do not benefit from 'formation' – be it Catholic theological, philosophical, or spiritual. He believes that it is harder for such individuals to recognize and avoid the traps of technology, such as addiction to games or artificial intelligence. He points out that many people, raised in 'broken homes' or exposed to unhealthy relationship models in the media, do not have a clear sense of what fulfilling human relationships are. In such a context, they easily turn to cheap substitutes offered by technology and AI, seeking instant dopamine hits and superficial connections. Matthew warns that without understanding their own gifts and purpose, people easily fall into the trap of aimless time-wasting, which makes them vulnerable to addictions and existential emptiness.

sections.subtitle: Egzistencijalna litica: Potraga za svrhom u svijetu ovisnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje koncept 'egzistencijalne litice' i opasnosti nedostatka svrhe.
sections.content: Matthew uvodi koncept 'egzistencijalne litice', opisujući stanje u kojem ljudi, lišeni istinske svrhe i zadovoljstva, padaju u beskrajni ciklus distrakcija. Bilo da se radi o igranju videoigara, pornografiji ili drugim oblicima bijega, te aktivnosti pružaju samo privremeno zadovoljstvo, ali ne ispunjavaju duboke ljudske potrebe. Na kraju, ljudi dosegnu 'vrh svijeta igara' ili bilo koje druge ovisnosti i shvate da to nije zadovoljavajuće. Tada se suočavaju s prazninom i nedostatkom smisla, što Matthew naziva 'egzistencijalnom liticom'. Upozorava da bez snažne evangelizacijske misije Crkve, koja bi ljudima pružila nadu i svrhu, mnogi će se 'izgubiti' i 'skočiti s litice', jer ne vide drugi put. Matthew naglašava da je to problem koji bi trebao zabrinjavati sve.
sections.subtitle_en: Existential cliff: Search for purpose in the world of addiction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the concept of 'existential cliff' and the dangers of lack of purpose.
sections.content_en: Matthew introduces the concept of 'existential cliff', describing a state in which people, deprived of true purpose and satisfaction, fall into an endless cycle of distractions. Whether it is about playing video games, pornography, or other forms of escape, these activities provide only temporary satisfaction, but do not fulfill deep human needs. In the end, people reach 'the top of the gaming world' or any other addiction and realize that it is not satisfying. Then they face emptiness and lack of meaning, which Matthew calls 'the existential cliff'. He warns that without a strong evangelization mission of the Church, which would provide people with hope and purpose, many will 'get lost' and 'jump off the cliff', because they do not see another way. Matthew emphasizes that this is a problem that should concern everyone.

sections.subtitle: Japan kao upozorenje: Demografska kriza i socijalna izolacija
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o demografskim problemima Japana kao upozorenju za globalno društvo.
sections.content: Matthew ističe demografske probleme Japana kao 'kanarinca u rudniku ugljena' za globalno društvo. Analizirajući stope nataliteta, brakova i opću vitalnost društva, primjećuje da se u Japanu te statistike drastično smanjuju. Za razliku od Kine, gdje je politika jednog djeteta imala jasan utjecaj, u Japanu je problem dublji: mladi su toliko socijalno izolirani i nespretni da im trebaju programi kako bi naučili kako se družiti. Matthew upozorava da se slični trendovi sve više pojavljuju i drugdje u svijetu. Ako se ne poduzmu koraci za sprječavanje ove socijalne i demografske krize, društva će se brzo kretati prema 'bezdanu' gdje će ljudi biti previše samosvjesni i nesposobni za stvaranje dubokih veza, što će imati katastrofalne posljedice za brak, obitelj i budućnost čovječanstva. Elon Musk također često koristi svoju platformu za upozoravanje na ove probleme, iako Matthew smatra da mu nedostaje konkretno rješenje, koje on vidi u katoličkoj vjeri.
sections.subtitle_en: Japan as a warning: Demographic crisis and social isolation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew talks about the demographic problems of Japan as a warning for global society.
sections.content_en: Matthew highlights Japan's demographic problems as 'a canary in a coal mine' for global society. Analyzing birth rates, marriage rates, and the general vitality of society, he notes that in Japan these statistics are drastically decreasing. Unlike China, where the one-child policy had a clear impact, in Japan the problem is deeper: young people are so socially isolated and awkward that they need programs to learn how to socialize. Matthew warns that similar trends are increasingly appearing elsewhere in the world. If steps are not taken to prevent this social and demographic crisis, societies will rapidly move towards an 'abyss' where people will be too self-conscious and incapable of forming deep connections, which will have catastrophic consequences for marriage, family, and the future of humanity. Elon Musk also often uses his platform to warn about these problems, although Matthew believes he lacks a concrete solution, which he sees in the Catholic faith.

sections.subtitle: Predviđanje budućnosti kroz analizu ponašanja i ljudske prirode
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip objašnjava kako se Matthewovi uvidi temelje na analizi obrazaca ponašanja.
sections.content: Otac Filip objašnjava da Matthewovi uvidi o budućnosti proizlaze iz analize obrazaca ponašanja i ekstrapolacije trendova, slično radu psihologa i ekonomista. Naglašava da ekonomija, za razliku od fizike, nije 'čista znanost' jer uključuje ljudski faktor, koji je često nepredvidiv. Spominje Miltona Friedmana i njegovu sklonost predviđanjima koja se ne ostvaruju jer ne uzimaju u obzir sve složene čimbenike ljudskog ponašanja. Otac Filip navodi primjer gdje ljudi često biraju skuplji proizvod, iako je identičan jeftinijem, što pokazuje iracionalnost ljudske prirode. Zaključuje da je razumijevanje ljudske prirode ključno za predviđanje budućnosti, a Matthewova sposobnost da prepozna te obrasce omogućuje mu da sagleda potencijalne izazove koji nas čekaju u sljedećih pet do deset godina.
sections.subtitle_en: Prediction of the future through analysis of behavior and human nature
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip explains how Matthew's insights are based on the analysis of behavior patterns.
sections.content_en: Father Filip explains that Matthew's insights about the future stem from the analysis of behavioral patterns and extrapolation of trends, similar to the work of psychologists and economists. He emphasizes that economics, unlike physics, is not a 'pure science' because it includes the human factor, which is often unpredictable. He mentions Milton Friedman and his tendency for predictions that do not come true because they do not take into account all complex factors of human behavior. Father Filip gives an example where people often choose a more expensive product, even though it is identical to a cheaper one, which shows the irrationality of human nature. He concludes that understanding human nature is crucial for predicting the future, and Matthew's ability to recognize these patterns allows him to foresee potential challenges that await us in the next five to ten years.

sections.subtitle: Jeffrey Hinton: 'Preuređujem sve' zbog straha od AI
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip prepričava anegdotu o Jeffreyu Hintonu i njegovoj reakciji na brzi razvoj AI.
sections.content: Otac Filip prepričava anegdotu o Jeffreyu Hintonu, jednom od pionira strojnog učenja i dobitniku Nobelove nagrade. Kada je Hinton primio vijest o nagradi, izjavio je da 'sada sve preuređuje' u svom životu – likvidira dugoročne investicije, otplaćuje hipoteku sinu. Ova zagonetna izjava, koju je Hinton objasnio kao pripremu za neizvjesnu budućnost, duboko je zabrinjavajuća. Otac Filip ističe da Hinton, kao i drugi ugledni stručnjaci poput Elona Muska, Billa Gatesa, Stevea Hawkinga i Aliasara Yukovskog, upozoravaju na disruptivni potencijal umjetne inteligencije. Njegova reakcija, 'ja se uređujem jer nemamo puno vremena', odražava duboku zabrinutost među onima koji najbolje razumiju tehnologiju, sugerirajući da se pripremaju za scenarij u kojem će se stvari drastično promijeniti, i to ne nužno na bolje.
sections.subtitle_en: Jeffrey Hinton: 'I am redoing everything' because of fear of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip recounts an anecdote about Jeffrey Hinton and his reaction to the rapid development of AI.
sections.content_en: Father Filip recounts an anecdote about Jeffrey Hinton, one of the pioneers of machine learning and a Nobel Prize winner. When Hinton received the news about the award, he stated that 'he is now rearranging everything' in his life – liquidating long-term investments, paying off his son's mortgage. This enigmatic statement, which Hinton explained as preparation for an uncertain future, is deeply concerning. Father Filip points out that Hinton, as well as other prominent experts like Elon Musk, Bill Gates, Steve Hawking, and Aliasar Yukovsky, warn about the disruptive potential of artificial intelligence. His reaction, 'I am rearranging myself because we don't have much time,' reflects deep concern among those who best understand the technology, suggesting that they are preparing for a scenario in which things will drastically change, and not necessarily for the better.

sections.subtitle: Cinizam bogatih i potreba za nadom u budućnost
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew raspravlja o cinizmu bogatih i važnosti nade u suočavanju s izazovima AI.
sections.content: Matthew interpretira ponašanje Jeffreyja Hintona i drugih ultrabogatih pojedinaca (poput gradnje bunkera i likvidacije imovine) kao znak cinizma i nedostatka povjerenja u sposobnost društva da se nosi s nadolazećim promjenama. Smatra da takav stav, gdje najuspješniji ljudi 'odustaju' od nade u bolju budućnost, može biti izuzetno opasan i demoralizirajući za širu javnost. Matthew naglašava da je u takvom kontekstu ključno pronaći način da se 'nacrta nada na putu'. Iako priznaje da je situacija teška, vjeruje da ljudi i dalje imaju moć oblikovati budućnost. Stoga je, prema Matthewu, iznimno važno da Katolička Crkva aktivno sudjeluje u ovoj raspravi, nudeći nadu i oslanjajući se na evanđeoska načela i učenja svetaca kako bi se pronašla rješenja za probleme koji, iako se čine novima, često imaju korijene u vječnim ljudskim izazovima.
sections.subtitle_en: Cynicism of the rich and the need for hope in the future
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew discusses the cynicism of the rich and the importance of hope in facing the challenges of AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew interprets the behavior of Jeffrey Hinton and other ultra-rich individuals (like building bunkers and liquidating assets) as a sign of cynicism and a lack of trust in society's ability to cope with impending changes. He believes that such an attitude, where the most successful people 'give up' hope for a better future, can be extremely dangerous and demoralizing for the wider public. Matthew emphasizes that in such a context, it is crucial to find a way to 'draw hope on the path'. Although he admits that the situation is difficult, he believes that people still have the power to shape the future. Therefore, according to Matthew, it is extremely important for the Catholic Church to actively participate in this discussion, offering hope and relying on Gospel principles and the teachings of saints to find solutions for problems which, although they seem new, often have roots in eternal human challenges.

iterations.theme_en: The role of the Church and society in shaping the future of AI and facing existential challenges

iterations.theme: Filozofske i teološke perspektive transhumanizma, AI usklađivanja i smisla života

sections.subtitle: Yuval Harari i upozorenja o budućnosti tehnologije: Dedaizam i distopijske vizije
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip drži knjigu Yuvala Hararija 'Homo Deus' ili sličnu knjigu o budućnosti tehnologije.
sections.content: Otac Filip započinje raspravu osvrćući se na djelo Yuvala Hararija, posebno na njegovu knjigu **'Homo Deus'** i završno poglavlje 'Dedaizam', koje služi kao upozorenje o budućnosti tehnologije. Harari, poznati povjesničar iz Izraela, prema Ocu Filipu, ne veliča tehnologiju, već koristi provokativne izjave kako bi šokirao čitatelje i natjerao ih na razmišljanje o smjeru u kojem se društvo kreće. Primjerice, Hararijeva tvrdnja da je 'Google mnogo bolji od spoja' za pronalaženje partnera, služi kao alarm da algoritmi mogu ponuditi 'bolje' podudarnosti, ali po cijenu ljudske interakcije. Matthew se slaže da transhumanistička vizija budućnosti nije poželjna, uspoređujući je s distopijskim scenarijima iz videoigara poput **'Cyberpunk 2077'**, gdje se ljudi spajaju sa strojevima u neprestanoj potrazi za nadogradnjom i korisnošću, što predstavlja ozbiljnu prijetnju ljudskosti.
sections.subtitle_en: Yuval Harari and warnings about the future of technology: Dadaism and dystopian visions
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip holds Yuval Harari's book 'Homo Deus' or a similar book about the future of technology.
sections.content_en: Father Filip begins the discussion by referring to the work of Yuval Harari, especially his book **'Homo Deus'** and the final chapter 'Dedaism', which serves as a warning about the future of technology. Harari, a renowned historian from Israel, according to Father Filip, does not glorify technology, but uses provocative statements to shock readers and make them think about the direction in which society is moving. For example, Harari's claim that 'Google is much better than a date' for finding a partner, serves as an alarm that algorithms can offer 'better' matches, but at the cost of human interaction. Matthew agrees that the transhumanist vision of the future is not desirable, comparing it to dystopian scenarios from video games like **'Cyberpunk 2077'**, where people merge with machines in a constant search for upgrades and utility, which represents a serious threat to humanity.

sections.subtitle: Transhumanizam i granice ljudskog poboljšanja: Kiborzi i etičke dileme
sections.screenshot_description: Ilustracija kiborga ili osobe s robotskim udovima, koja simbolizira granice ljudskog poboljšanja.
sections.content: Matthew i Otac Filip dublje ulaze u raspravu o konceptu **kiborga** i etičkim granicama ljudskog poboljšanja. Matthew se poziva na stav Oca Alejandra Crosswithea, profesora na Angelicumu, koji razlikuje tehnologiju koja obnavlja puni ljudski život od one koja ga umanjuje. Primjerice, robotska ruka za zamjenu izgubljenog uda je prihvatljiva jer vraća funkciju, dok zamjena dijela mozga strojem radi proširenja računalnih sposobnosti nije, jer umanjuje ljudskost. Otac Filip dodaje da, iako naočale mogu biti oblik kiborškog poboljšanja jer pomažu vidu, namjerno amputiranje uda radi bioničke zamjene, čak i ako poboljšava performanse, Crkva bi vjerojatno smatrala nepotrebnom operacijom. Matthew proširuje ovu ideju na 'pametne naočale' koje pružaju informacije o ljudima u stvarnom vremenu, tvrdeći da takva tehnologija narušava društveni ugovor i pravo na anonimnost, što dovodi do ozbiljnih društvenih posljedica o kojima se nedovoljno raspravlja.
sections.subtitle_en: Transhumanism and the limits of human enhancement: Cyborgs and ethical dilemmas
sections.screenshot_description_en: Illustration of a cyborg or a person with robotic limbs, which symbolizes the limits of human enhancement.
sections.content_en: Matthew and Father Filip delve deeper into a discussion about the concept of **cyborgs** and the ethical limits of human enhancement. Matthew refers to the view of Father Alejandro Crosswithe, a professor at the Angelicum, who distinguishes between technology that restores full human life and that which diminishes it. For example, a robotic arm to replace a lost limb is acceptable because it restores function, while replacing a part of the brain with a machine to expand computational abilities is not, because it diminishes humanity. Father Filip adds that, although glasses can be a form of cyborg enhancement because they aid vision, intentionally amputating a limb for a bionic replacement, even if it improves performance, the Church would likely consider an unnecessary operation. Matthew extends this idea to 'smart glasses' that provide real-time information about people, arguing that such technology violates the social contract and the right to anonymity, which leads to serious social consequences that are insufficiently discussed.

sections.subtitle: Filozofska kritika funkcionalizma: Zašto AI nema 'dušu'
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz mozga i računalnog čipa, simbolizirajući razliku između ljudske i umjetne inteligencije.
sections.content: Ben postavlja pitanje o transhumanističkoj ideji da umjetna inteligencija može imati 'dušu' i o konceptu **funkcionalizma**, koji izjednačava mozak s računalom. Otac Filip objašnjava da je funkcionalizam, iako popularan u devedesetima (zahvaljujući filozofima poput Hillaryja Putnama), u filozofskim krugovima uglavnom odbačen. Ističe da bi tehnološki lideri trebali proučavati filozofiju kako bi izbjegli ponavljanje već opovrgnutih teorija. Kao ključni argument navodi misaoni eksperiment **Johna Searlea**: ako bi se svi neuroni u ljudskom mozgu zamijenili računalnim čipovima s istim funkcijama, mozak više ne bi bio ljudski, jer su biološki organi esencijalni. Neuroznanstvenici potvrđuju da računalni čipovi ne mogu obavljati iste funkcije kao neuroni. Otac Filip naglašava da je čak i Hillary Putnam u svojoj knjizi **'Realism with a Human Face'** javno povukao svoje ranije funkcionalističke stavove, priznajući da mozak i računalo nisu isto, što je značajan potez za tako istaknutog filozofa.
sections.subtitle_en: Philosophical critique of functionalism: Why AI does not have 'soul'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Representation of a brain and a computer chip, symbolizing the difference between human and artificial intelligence.
sections.content_en: Ben asks a question about the transhumanist idea that artificial intelligence can have a 'soul' and about the concept of **functionalism**, which equates the brain with a computer. Father Filip explains that functionalism, although popular in the nineties (thanks to philosophers like Hillary Putnam), has been largely rejected in philosophical circles. He points out that technological leaders should study philosophy to avoid repeating already refuted theories. As a key argument, he cites **John Searle's** thought experiment: if all neurons in the human brain were replaced with computer chips with the same functions, the brain would no longer be human, because biological organs are essential. Neuroscientists confirm that computer chips cannot perform the same functions as neurons. Father Filip emphasizes that even Hillary Putnam, in his book **'Realism with a Human Face'**, publicly retracted his earlier functionalist views, admitting that the brain and a computer are not the same, which is a significant move for such a prominent philosopher.

sections.subtitle: Transhumanizam bez doktrine: Utjecaj moćnih i potraga za besmrtnošću
sections.screenshot_description: Grafički prikaz nejasnih granica transhumanizma ili simbola moći i bogatstva u kontekstu tehnologije.
sections.content: Matthew ističe temeljni problem transhumanizma: za razliku od Katoličke Crkve koja ima jasnu doktrinu i Magisterij, **transhumanizam nema definiranu doktrinu**. Njegova je definicija subjektivna i u konačnici će je oblikovati oni s moći – bogati tehnološki lideri. Matthew primjećuje da mnogi istaknuti tehnolozi dijele transhumanističke stavove, zamišljajući budućnost u kojoj čovječanstvo nadilazi svoju biološku konstrukciju. On to povezuje s vječnom ljudskom željom za **besmrtnošću** i težnjom da se postane 'nalik Bogu', što vidi kao odbacivanje Boga i uzaludan pokušaj izbjegavanja smrti. Upozorava na cijenu takvog projekta, navodeći distopijske znanstveno-fantastične serije poput **'Westworlda'** i **'Altered Carbona'**, gdje produljeni životni vijek dovodi do moralnog propadanja, siromaštva i neprestanog lova na dopaminske udarce, što u konačnici ne donosi zadovoljstvo. Matthew naglašava da Crkva nudi 'životvorni' put usmjeren na istinske odnose i smislene svrhe, kao alternativu uzaludnoj potrazi za besmrtnošću.
sections.subtitle_en: Transhumanism without doctrine: Influence of the powerful and search for immortality
sections.screenshot_description_en: Graphic representation of the unclear boundaries of transhumanism or symbols of power and wealth in the context of technology.
sections.content_en: Matthew highlights the fundamental problem of transhumanism: unlike the Catholic Church which has a clear doctrine and Magisterium, **transhumanism has no defined doctrine**. Its definition is subjective and will ultimately be shaped by those with power – wealthy technological leaders. Matthew notes that many prominent technologists share transhumanist views, imagining a future in which humanity transcends its biological construct. He connects this with the eternal human desire for **immortality** and the aspiration to become 'like God', which he sees as a rejection of God and a futile attempt to avoid death. He warns of the cost of such a project, citing dystopian science-fiction series like **'Westworld'** and **'Altered Carbon'**, where extended lifespan leads to moral decay, poverty, and a constant hunt for dopamine hits, which ultimately does not bring satisfaction. Matthew emphasizes that the Church offers a 'life-giving' path focused on true relationships and meaningful purposes, as an alternative to the futile pursuit of immortality.

sections.subtitle: Usklađivanje AI s ljudskim vrijednostima: Crkva kao stručnjak za ljudsko stanje
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz AI sučelja s ljudskim vrijednostima ili simbolom ravnoteže između tehnologije i etike.
sections.content: Matthew objašnjava koncept **usklađivanja umjetne inteligencije (AI alignment)**, čiji je cilj osigurati da AI razumije i dijeli ljudske vrijednosti te djeluje u korist ljudskog procvata. Međutim, izazov leži u definiranju 'ljudskog procvata' i odabiru čije vrijednosti treba uskladiti. Zbog poteškoća u postizanju konsenzusa, fokus se pomaknuo na tehničke aspekte poput istinitosti modela. Matthew spominje stav Elona Muska da bi AI trebala 'voljeti' i biti 'znatiželjna' o čovječanstvu. Matthew snažno zagovara da **Katolička Crkva**, kao 'najveći stručnjak za ljudsko stanje' s tisućljećima proučavanja, mora imati ključnu ulogu u ovim raspravama. Predlaže da se 'osobnost' AI modelira po uzoru na **Isusa Krista**. Smatra da bi Isus, kao sveprisutna, ali ne i prijeteća figura, koju se može voljeti i kojoj se može vjerovati, bio idealan model za superinteligentnu AI, osiguravajući da nikada ne naudi drugom čovjeku. Ova rasprava je ključna jer se AI trenira na ljudskim podacima, što znači da imamo mogućnost oblikovati njezine karakteristike.
sections.subtitle_en: Alignment of AI with human values: The Church as an expert on the human condition
sections.screenshot_description_en: Display of AI interface with human values or a symbol of balance between technology and ethics.
sections.content_en: Matthew explains the concept of **artificial intelligence alignment (AI alignment)**, whose goal is to ensure that AI understands and shares human values and acts for the benefit of human flourishing. However, the challenge lies in defining 'human flourishing' and choosing whose values should be aligned. Due to difficulties in achieving consensus, the focus has shifted to technical aspects such as model truthfulness. Matthew mentions Elon Musk's view that AI should 'love' and be 'curious' about humanity. Matthew strongly advocates that the **Catholic Church**, as the 'greatest expert on the human condition' with millennia of study, must have a key role in these discussions. He suggests that the 'personality' of AI be modeled after **Jesus Christ**. He believes that Jesus, as an omnipresent but non-threatening figure, who can be loved and trusted, would be an ideal model for superintelligent AI, ensuring that it never harms another human being. This discussion is crucial because AI is trained on human data, which means we have the ability to shape its characteristics.

sections.subtitle: Smisao života: Volja Oca i ljubav kao temelj katoličke poruke
sections.screenshot_description: Simbol križa ili srca, predstavljajući volju Oca i ljubav kao smisao života.
sections.content: Na pitanje o smislu života, koje postavljaju i lideri u području umjetne inteligencije, Otac Filip se vraća na središnju poruku Katoličke Crkve: **Isusa Krista**. Ističe dva dominantna aspekta Isusove osobnosti: činjenje volje Oca i ljubav prema drugima. Prema Ocu Filipu, Isusovi postupci bili su motivirani ljubavlju i poslušnošću Ocu, a imitiranje tih načela učinilo bi svijet boljim mjestom. Zaključuje da ljepota Katoličke Crkve leži u tome što, iako možda nema sve odgovore, nudi sadržaj koji zadovoljava najdublje ljudske želje i pitanja. Citira župljanina koji je rekao: 'Isus se prodaje. Samo nam dajte Krista, i to je sve što vam treba', naglašavajući da će ova poruka biti potrebnija nego ikad u bliskoj budućnosti.
sections.subtitle_en: Meaning of life: The Will of the Father and love as the foundation of the Catholic message
sections.screenshot_description_en: Symbol of the cross or heart, representing the will of the Father and love as the meaning of life.
sections.content_en: To the question about the meaning of life, which is also posed by leaders in the field of artificial intelligence, Otac Filip returns to the central message of the Catholic Church: **Jesus Christ**. He highlights two dominant aspects of Jesus' personality: doing the will of the Father and love for others. According to Otac Filip, Jesus' actions were motivated by love and obedience to the Father, and imitating these principles would make the world a better place. He concludes that the beauty of the Catholic Church lies in the fact that, although it may not have all the answers, it offers content that satisfies the deepest human desires and questions. He quotes a parishioner who said: 'Jesus sells. Just give us Christ, and that's all you need', emphasizing that this message will be more needed than ever in the near future.

iterations.theme_en: Philosophical and theological perspectives of transhumanism, AI alignment, and the meaning of life
